# Fruitish

> Fresh, customized fruit boxes delivered daily in Ahmedabad, India. Fruitish offers flexible subscription plans for perfectly portioned fruits — eliminating overbuying and wastage.

Fruitish is a local fruit delivery service based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Customers subscribe to daily fruit box plans (200–400 gm portions) tailored to their needs. Delivery happens before 8 AM every morning. Available on Swiggy and Zomato as well as direct subscription via WhatsApp.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fruitish.in/): Hero, product features, how it works, pricing plans, testimonials
- [Blogs](https://fruitish.in/blogs.html): Nutrition tips, seasonal fruit guides, wellness articles
- [Blog Detail](https://fruitish.in/blog-detail.html): Individual blog article page

## Business Details

- **Location**: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India (PIN 380059)
- **Phone**: +91 7600 40 6507
- **Email**: hello@fruitish.in
- **Hours**: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Monday – Sunday
- **Delivery**: Before 8 AM daily

## Subscription Plans

- Berry Berry (200 gm/day, 30 days) — ₹1999/month
- Tropical Treat (300 gm/day, 30 days) — ₹2799/month
- Fruitful Feast (400 gm/day, 30 days) — ₹3499/month
- Corporate: Smart Start Pack (200 gm, workdays) — ₹1000/month
- Corporate: Powered Pack (300 gm, workdays) — ₹1500/month
